ocr_findings.description: Question 4-22 has a 2-column layout in the image (гӮў/гӮӨ on left, гӮҰ/гӮЁ on right). Cleaned OCR renders as a markdown 2-column table, which preserves content but loses the visual two-column choice arrangement. Semantically equivalent.

reviewer_notes: Four exam questions (4-19 to 4-22) on recommender systems, freemium model, IoT examples, and embedded systems. All question stems, answer choices, and the answer key line at bottom ('е•ҸйЎҢ4-19 гӮЁ е•ҸйЎҢ4-20 гӮҰ е•ҸйЎҢ4-21 гӮҰ е•ҸйЎҢ4-22 гӮҰ') accurately captured. Cleaned version handles this page well.
